name: Recorder
author: contributors
description: Records and plays back radio audio. Three capture sources, operator-selectable: RX (the demodulated band audio you hear), TX MIC (your raw microphone, pre-processing), and TX AIR (the processed transmit audio — what actually goes on the air). Playback monitors locally, or transmits the clip on the air while you hold MOX. Uses the host's read-only audio taps + playback sink; never alters live audio and occupies no insert-chain slot. Realtime-safe — the audio thread writes a lock-free ring and a background thread flushes to disk. WAV float32/48 kHz mono; recordings live under the plugin folder and are downloadable from the panel.
